message:
feat(command): refactor LuaTable to use Rc<RefCell> interior mutability, harden integer/float parsing

- Wrap LuaTable fields in Rc<RefCell<LuaTableInner>> to support shared
  mutable table references during Lua evaluation
- Remove .trim() from parse_f64_arg to reject whitespace-padded floats
- Replace parse_i64_arg with a bounds-checked, no-alloc parser matching
  Redis string2ll semantics (rejects leading zeros, whitespace, overflow)
- Add test_lua_bugs regression cases for the table-ref and parse fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
